{{CargoRelic
|name=Yamato Postcard
|class_id=20407
|rank=Green
|affct=ART
|source=
|description=While scouting for info about the Demon God in Yamato, the snail also recorded a lot of local customs, which were brought together in this postcard. You can read it to kill time and post it online to get many likes!
|fame=20
|art=29
|fth=10
|civ=12
|tech=19
|ss1=Yamato Museum Medal Output +5
|ss2=Yamato Museum Medal Output +10
|ss3=Yamato Museum Medal Output +15
|ss4=Yamato Museum Medal Output +15
|ss7=Yamato Museum Medal Output +15<br> (Awakened)
}}
